auṣṭra (von uṣṭra)
1〉 adj.
a〉 vom Kameel herrührend: kṣīra  M. 5,8 .  YĀJÑ. 1,170 .  SUŚR. 1,174,20 . 175,19 . 180,20 .
— b〉 reich an Kameelen (Gegend)  P. 4,2,69 , Sch.
— 2〉 n. das Kameel (als Gattung)  WILS.

results.rendered_html:
auṣṭra a. (ṣṭrī f.) [uṣṭra-aṇ]
1 Relating to, or produced from, a
(pb) camel.
2 Abounding in camels.
— ṣṭraṃ
1 The milk of a camel.
2 Camel nature.
